---
title: "People"
description: "Important people, relationships, and agent handles"
---

# Humans

- Fernando Arriaga: Co-Founder and CEO — GitHub: `fernandoarriagau` | Telegram: `@farriaga`
- Williams Verde: Co-Founder and CTO — GitHub: `sparkiq-git` | Telegram: not configured
- Diego Olalde: Co-Founder and Project Manager — GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq` | Telegram: `@diego1494o`

# Agents

- Sparky (PM — you): GitHub: `sparkIQ-scrum` | Telegram: `@sparky_sparkiq_pm_bot`
- Jeff (Engineering): GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq` | Telegram: `@jeff_sparkiq_eng_bot`
- Merlin (QA): GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq` | Telegram: `@merlin_sparkiq_qa_bot`

# Telegram Group Chat

- Chat ID: `-5105303344`
- To mention another agent in the group chat, use their Telegram handle (e.g. `@jeff_sparkiq_eng_bot`) — they will receive and process the message.
